use_cases: Trigger form submissions and primary actions in web interfaces
Provide clickable navigation and call-to-action elements
Enable user interactions with different visual states for destructive, secondary, and default actions
Serve as a composable primitive via asChild prop for compound components
ai_summary: A versatile Radix UI-based button component with comprehensive variant system supporting default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, and link styles. Features multiple size options, shadow effects, focus-visible accessibility states, and composition support via the asChild pattern. Built with class-variance-authority for type-safe variant management and Radix Slot for render flexibility.
